game_meta_description: Play Contexto in Ainu. Guess the hidden word by meaning and use the ranking feedback to get closer.
game_fresh_title: Guess the hidden Ainu word by meaning.
game_intro: A hidden Ainu word has been chosen. Each guess returns a semantic rank, and smaller numbers mean you are closer.
game_compact_intro: Your guesses are already sorted from closest to farthest. Push the best ranks first.
game_new_puzzle_confirm_prompt: Start a new puzzle? Your current progress will be lost.
game_empty_state_body: Try a common Ainu word like "kamuy" or "aynu".
game_default_feedback: Enter an Ainu word to see how close it is to the hidden answer.
game_new_puzzle_feedback: A new Ainu puzzle is ready.
game_load_failed_feedback: Failed to load the Ainu puzzle data. Please try again.
game_duplicate_guess_feedback: You already guessed "{word}". It is currently ranked #{rank}.
game_lookup_failed_feedback: There was a problem looking up similarity. Please try again.
game_known_word_unmatched_feedback: "{word}" is in the dataset, but it could not be matched cleanly. Try a nearby word.
game_unknown_word_feedback: "{word}" is not available in the current dataset. Try another word.
game_hint_solved_feedback: The proximity hint auto-submitted and solved the puzzle with "{answer}".
game_hint_applied_feedback: The proximity hint auto-submitted "{word}", now ranked #{rank}.
game_length_hint_feedback: Hint: the answer is {count} characters long.
game_no_more_proximity_feedback: No better proximity hint is available right now.
game_give_up_confirm_prompt: Reveal the answer and end this puzzle?
game_give_up_feedback: You gave up. The answer was "{answer}".
game_difficulty_subtitle: Starting a new puzzle will discard the current one.
game_difficulty_hard_hint: Rarer words from the long tail.
game_genre_hint_feedback: Genre: the answer is in the category {category}.
game_genre_hint_unavailable_feedback: No genre hint available for this puzzle.
